sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a left ankle injury sustained from a fall, describing it as 'really kind of felt extended and stretched' and a pain level of 8 out of 10. He states he took ibuprofen and elevated/iced the ankle. He mentions walking to the house but feeling pain and has been taking ibuprofen. He reports a walk behind the new Rex Center trails with his wife.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: There is ecchymosis over the lateral malleolus and swelling, edema. Capillary refill is brisk. Dorsalis pedis pulses are strong. Motor and sensation are intact bilaterally. X-ray shows no fracture or bony abnormalities.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: Nkle sprain of the lateral ligament complex is diagnosed.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe an air cast and crutches. Advise weight-bearing as tolerated. Schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks. Continue NSAIDs for pain and swelling management. Recommend physical therapy as appropriate.
